# Take Time - AI Study Planner

> Take Time is a personal study planner with an API and MCP Server for AI-powered schedule management.

## Documentation

- [Introduction](https://docs.taketime.space/introduction): Overview of Take Time and its capabilities
- [Quickstart](https://docs.taketime.space/quickstart): Get started in 5 minutes
- [Authentication](https://docs.taketime.space/authentication): API keys and authentication

## Core Concepts

- [Study Blocks](https://docs.taketime.space/concepts/blocks): Time-boxed study sessions
- [Activities & Subjects](https://docs.taketime.space/concepts/subjects): Study, training, and routine profiles
- [Schedule](https://docs.taketime.space/concepts/schedule): Weekly time management with pizza chart
- [Stats & Progress](https://docs.taketime.space/concepts/stats): Heatmaps, streaks, and metrics

## API Reference

- [API Introduction](https://docs.taketime.space/api-reference/introduction): Base URL, auth, error codes, pagination
- [List Blocks](https://docs.taketime.space/api-reference/blocks/list): GET /blocks - List study blocks
- [Create Block](https://docs.taketime.space/api-reference/blocks/create): POST /blocks - Create study block
- [Update Block](https://docs.taketime.space/api-reference/blocks/update): PATCH /blocks/:id - Update block
- [Delete Block](https://docs.taketime.space/api-reference/blocks/delete): DELETE /blocks/:id - Delete block
- [List Subjects](https://docs.taketime.space/api-reference/subjects/list): GET /subjects - List activities
- [Create Subject](https://docs.taketime.space/api-reference/subjects/create): POST /subjects - Create activity
- [Update Subject](https://docs.taketime.space/api-reference/subjects/update): PATCH /subjects/:id - Update activity
- [Delete Subject](https://docs.taketime.space/api-reference/subjects/delete): DELETE /subjects/:id - Delete activity
- [Get Stats](https://docs.taketime.space/api-reference/stats/get): GET /stats - Completion stats and heatmap
- [Get Schedule](https://docs.taketime.space/api-reference/schedule/get): GET /schedule - Weekly schedule
- [Suggest Schedule](https://docs.taketime.space/api-reference/schedule/suggest): POST /schedule/suggest - AI suggestions

## MCP Server

- [Overview](https://docs.taketime.space/mcp/overview): Connect AI assistants via Model Context Protocol
- [Installation](https://docs.taketime.space/mcp/installation): Setup for Claude Desktop, Cursor, VS Code
- [Tools](https://docs.taketime.space/mcp/tools): Available MCP tools reference
- [Examples](https://docs.taketime.space/mcp/examples): Real-world usage examples

## CLI

- [CLI Overview](https://docs.taketime.space/cli/overview): Manage schedule from the terminal
- [Installation](https://docs.taketime.space/cli/installation): Install and authenticate the CLI
- [Commands](https://docs.taketime.space/cli/commands): Full command reference (today, schedule, blocks, subjects, items, priorities, stats, heatmap, settings, logs)

## Guides

- [Production](https://docs.taketime.space/guides/production): Go-live checklist
